## Quick Reference

- **Generate a prompt:** `"generate prompt for [task]"`
- **Execute all pending:** `"execute all tasks"`
- **Execute specific prompt:** `"execute [prompt_id]"`
- **Template:** [shared-prompt-template.md](templates/shared-prompt-template.md)
